prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art sprite ONLY. Canvas is exactly 32 logical columns by 48 logical rows rendered large — each logical pixel MUST be a perfectly uniform solid-color square block about 32 rendered pixels wide, with crisp aligned grid seams throughout. One tiny whimsical mushroom creature named Pipcap, strict side profile facing LEFT, cream-gold cap, berry-pink stem body, dark-plum eye and feet. The mushroom silhouette must be SMALL: about 24 logical columns wide and 38-40 logical rows tall, centered, with LARGE flat #ff00ff magenta margins on all four sides (at least 4 magenta cells left and right). 10 flat colors max, one-cell dark outline. No anti-aliasing, no gradients, no dithering, no soft edges, no floor, no shadow, no glow, no text. Magenta background must be perfectly flat #ff00ff.
